reviews.comment:
Excelente atención , ojalá todas las estaciones furan como está en la atención. Bariloche con una YPF nos defraudó. Está fue muy buena. 28/01/2023 .

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, I wish all stations were as attentive as this one. The YPF station in Bariloche disappointed us. This one was very good. 28/01/2023

reviews.comment:
Una pena el servicio , el lugar espectacular , pero le falta muchísima inversión para era un buen lugar de descanso ,de paso , el restaurant unos asaltantes una pena para zapala

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible; the place is spectacular, but it desperately needs investment. It used to be a great place to rest and stop over. The restaurant was a disgrace, a real shame for Zapala.

reviews.comment:
Paramos a comer algo. Las empanadas de jamón y queso parecían de paté y no había otra buena opción de comida.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped for a bite to eat. The ham and cheese empanadas were like pâté, and there were no other good options.

reviews.comment:
Pocos playeros para la gran demanda de vehículos, si pusieran 1 playero por surtidor sería más eficaz, 30 minutos de espera.

(Translated by Google)
Too few attendants for the high demand of vehicles; if they put 1 attendant per pump it would be more efficient; 30-minute wait.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRM092M3JBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es un punto neuralgico desde donde salen varias rutas hacia diferentes destinos. Pasamos en verano y realmente el espacio queda chico para la cantidad de gente u1e recibe. Los baños son pocos y el lugar para comprar alimentos estrecho e incómodo.

(Translated by Google)
It's a central hub from which several routes depart to different destinations. We stopped by in the summer, and the space was really small for the number of people it welcomed. The restrooms were limited, and the place to buy food was narrow and uncomfortable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCX2I3RjRnRRAB
